requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (GSO IEC 62471 Risk Groups)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（GSO IEC 62471 危险组别）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（GSO IEC 62471 危險組別）

summary.en: Oman applies the GSO-adopted version of IEC 62471 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems) for assessing the photobiological / blue light hazard of LED lamps and luminaires. Through MOCIIP / DGSM, in-scope regulated lighting products are expected to have a documented photobiological risk-group classification (RG0 Exempt to RG3 High risk), derived from blue-light-weighted radiance and irradiance measurements, as part of the conformity technical documentation. Products in higher risk groups (RG2 and above) carry usage restrictions and labelling / warning expectations. The supporting test method follows the GSO/IEC 62471 standard as adopted; evidence is submitted via the in-country importer under the DGSM conformity scheme.
summary.zh: 阿曼采用 GSO 采纳版的 IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）评估 LED 灯与灯具的光生物/蓝光危害。通过 MOCIIP / DGSM，适用范围内的受管制照明产品应具备记录在案的光生物危险组别分类（RG0 豁免至 RG3 高危险），由蓝光加权辐亮度和辐照度测量得出，并作为合格评定技术文件的一部分。较高危险组别（RG2 及以上）的产品存在使用限制及标签/警告要求。支持性测试方法依据采纳的 GSO/IEC 62471 标准；证据经在地进口商按 DGSM 合格评定制度提交。
summary.zht: 阿曼採用 GSO 採納版的 IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）評估 LED 燈與燈具的光生物/藍光危害。透過 MOCIIP / DGSM，適用範圍內的受管制照明產品應具備記錄在案的光生物危險組別分類（RG0 豁免至 RG3 高危險），由藍光加權輻亮度和輻照度測量得出，並作為合格評定技術文件的一部分。較高危險組別（RG2 及以上）的產品存在使用限制及標籤/警告要求。支持性測試方法依據採納的 GSO/IEC 62471 標準；證據經在地進口商按 DGSM 合格評定制度提交。

standards_or_laws: GSO-adopted IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (risk group classification; enforced in Oman via MOCIIP / DGSM)
DGSM conformity technical documentation requirements for regulated lighting products

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), technically equivalent to IEC 62471:2006. GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market; enforcement and testing obligations are less prescriptive for residential luminaires.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），并非对所有中国市场 LED 灯具均为强制要求；对居民灯具的执行及检测义务规定不够严格。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），並非對所有中國市場 LED 燈具均為強制要求；對居民燈具的執行及檢測義務規定不夠嚴格。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, equivalent to IEC 62471:2006)

gap.en: Both Oman (GSO IEC 62471) and China (GB/T 20145) derive from IEC 62471, so the technical method for risk-group classification is largely harmonized and a CN GB/T 20145 test report can serve as a strong basis. The differences are: (1) CN GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard and is often not routinely tested for residential luminaires, so a CN-spec product may lack a documented risk-group classification; (2) for the Oman market the photobiological risk group should be documented in the DGSM conformity technical file and submitted via the in-country importer; (3) confirm the GSO-adopted IEC 62471 edition, as it may differ from the 2006 edition underlying GB/T 20145. RG2/RG3 products require warnings and usage instructions. Most general-purpose LED luminaires fall in RG0 or RG1 with no usage restriction, but the classification should be formally recorded.
gap.zh: 阿曼（GSO IEC 62471）与中国（GB/T 20145）均源自 IEC 62471，故危险组别分类的技术方法基本协调，中国 GB/T 20145 检测报告可作为有力基础。差异在于：（1）中国 GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准，对居民灯具常不进行常规检测，故中国规格产品可能缺乏记录在案的危险组别分类；（2）面向阿曼市场，光生物危险组别应记录于 DGSM 合格评定技术文件中，并经在地进口商提交；（3）请确认 GSO 采纳的 IEC 62471 版本，因其可能不同于 GB/T 20145 所依据的 2006 年版。RG2/RG3 产品须附带警告及使用说明。大多数通用 LED 灯具属 RG0 或 RG1，无使用限制，但分类应正式记录。
gap.zht: 阿曼（GSO IEC 62471）與中國（GB/T 20145）均源自 IEC 62471，故危險組別分類的技術方法基本協調，中國 GB/T 20145 檢測報告可作為有力基礎。差異在於：（1）中國 GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準，對居民燈具常不進行常規檢測，故中國規格產品可能缺乏記錄在案的危險組別分類；（2）面向阿曼市場，光生物危險組別應記錄於 DGSM 合格評定技術文件中，並經在地進口商提交；（3）請確認 GSO 採納的 IEC 62471 版本，因其可能不同於 GB/T 20145 所依據的 2006 年版。RG2/RG3 產品須附帶警告及使用說明。大多數通用 LED 燈具屬 RG0 或 RG1，無使用限制，但分類應正式記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Expected (in scope) — photobiological risk-group classification per GSO-adopted IEC 62471 documented in the DGSM conformity technical file for regulated lighting products; RG2/RG3 carry labelling and usage restrictions
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145-2006 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is not universally prescribed

source.publisher: MOCIIP — Directorate General for Standards and Metrology (DGSM), Sultanate of Oman

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Oman assesses photobiological / blue light hazard using the GSO-adopted IEC 62471 risk-group method, with the classification expected in the DGSM conformity technical file for regulated lighting. China's GB/T 20145 is recommended-only and may not have been tested for a CN-spec product, so exporters should ensure a documented risk-group classification is prepared for the Oman file. Confirm the GSO-adopted IEC 62471 edition; RG2/RG3 products require warnings and usage restrictions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿曼采用 GSO 采纳的 IEC 62471 危险组别方法评估光生物/蓝光危害，并要求在 DGSM 合格评定技术文件中记录该分类。中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性标准，中国规格产品可能未经检测，故出口商应确保为阿曼文件准备记录在案的危险组别分类。请确认 GSO 采纳的 IEC 62471 版本；RG2/RG3 产品须附带警告及使用限制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿曼採用 GSO 採納的 IEC 62471 危險組別方法評估光生物/藍光危害，並要求在 DGSM 合格評定技術文件中記錄該分類。中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性標準，中國規格產品可能未經檢測，故出口商應確保為阿曼文件準備記錄在案的危險組別分類。請確認 GSO 採納的 IEC 62471 版本；RG2/RG3 產品須附帶警告及使用限制。

requirement_topic.en: Product Marking, Warnings and Arabic / English Labelling for Lighting (DGSM)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明产品标识、警告及阿拉伯语/英语标签（DGSM）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明產品標識、警告及阿拉伯語/英語標籤（DGSM）

summary.en: For the Oman market, regulated LED lamps and luminaires must carry product marking and labelling consistent with the GSO-adopted standards and DGSM requirements, generally including manufacturer / importer identification, rated electrical and photometric data, applicable safety markings, and a GSO energy-efficiency label where in scope. Consumer-facing labelling and instructions are commonly expected in Arabic and English. Where the photobiological assessment places a product in RG2 or above, appropriate hazard warnings and usage instructions should appear on the product / packaging. The legal basis is the DGSM-adopted GSO marking and labelling technical regulation; the importer of record is responsible for ensuring compliant labelling at the point of market placement.
summary.zh: 面向阿曼市场，受管制的 LED 灯与灯具须具备符合 GSO 采纳标准及 DGSM 要求的产品标识与标签，通常包括制造商/进口商标识、额定电气及光度数据、适用安全标志，以及在适用范围内的 GSO 能效标签。面向消费者的标签与说明通常要求以阿拉伯语和英语提供。若光生物评估将产品置于 RG2 及以上，产品/包装上应出现适当的危害警告及使用说明。法律依据为 DGSM 采纳的 GSO 标识与标签技术法规；登记进口商负责确保上市时标签合规。
summary.zht: 面向阿曼市場，受管制的 LED 燈與燈具須具備符合 GSO 採納標準及 DGSM 要求的產品標識與標籤，通常包括製造商/進口商標識、額定電氣及光度數據、適用安全標誌，以及在適用範圍內的 GSO 能效標籤。面向消費者的標籤與說明通常要求以阿拉伯語和英語提供。若光生物評估將產品置於 RG2 及以上，產品/包裝上應出現適當的危害警告及使用說明。法律依據為 DGSM 採納的 GSO 標識與標籤技術法規；登記進口商負責確保上市時標籤合規。

standards_or_laws: DGSM-adopted GSO marking and labelling technical regulation for lighting products (manufacturer / importer ID, ratings, safety marks, GSO energy label)
Arabic / English consumer labelling expectation for products placed on the Oman market

summary.en: Chinese LED luminaire marking follows GB 7000-series safety standards (markings, ratings) and the China Energy Label under GB 30255; consumer information is in Chinese. The China RoHS disclosure label (orange / green) under SJ/T 11364-2014 may also appear. There is no Chinese requirement for Arabic labelling, and Chinese packaging does not carry the GSO energy-efficiency label or Oman-specific warnings.
summary.zh: 中国 LED 灯具标识遵循 GB 7000 系列安全标准（标识、额定值）及 GB 30255 下的中国能效标识；消费者信息以中文提供。SJ/T 11364-2014 下的中国 RoHS 披露标识（橙/绿）也可能出现。中国无阿拉伯语标签要求，中国包装不附 GSO 能效标签或阿曼特定警告。
summary.zht: 中國 LED 燈具標識遵循 GB 7000 系列安全標準（標識、額定值）及 GB 30255 下的中國能效標識；消費者信息以中文提供。SJ/T 11364-2014 下的中國 RoHS 披露標識（橙/綠）也可能出現。中國無阿拉伯語標籤要求，中國包裝不附 GSO 能效標籤或阿曼特定警告。

standards_or_laws: GB 7000-series safety marking requirements + GB 30255-2019 China Energy Label (Chinese-language consumer information)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — China RoHS hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange / green)

gap.en: Chinese product / packaging marking is prepared for the CN domestic market in Chinese and does not meet Oman labelling expectations. For Oman, exporters must: (1) provide consumer labelling and instructions in Arabic and English; (2) re-mark rated electrical data to reflect 240 V 50 Hz operation; (3) apply the GSO energy-efficiency label where the product is in scope; (4) add photobiological hazard warnings for RG2+ products; and (5) display manufacturer and in-country importer identification per DGSM requirements. The China Energy Label and China RoHS disclosure label have no standing in Oman and should be replaced by the GSO label and Oman-compliant marking. The importer of record carries responsibility for compliant labelling at market placement.
gap.zh: 中国产品/包装标识为中国国内市场以中文准备，不满足阿曼标签要求。面向阿曼，出口商须：（1）以阿拉伯语和英语提供消费者标签与说明；（2）重新标注额定电气数据以反映 240 V 50 Hz 运行；（3）在产品属适用范围时贴附 GSO 能效标签；（4）为 RG2+ 产品添加光生物危害警告；并（5）按 DGSM 要求显示制造商及在地进口商标识。中国能效标识与中国 RoHS 披露标识在阿曼无效力，应替换为 GSO 标签及符合阿曼要求的标识。登记进口商在上市时承担标签合规责任。
gap.zht: 中國產品/包裝標識為中國國內市場以中文準備，不滿足阿曼標籤要求。面向阿曼，出口商須：（1）以阿拉伯語和英語提供消費者標籤與說明；（2）重新標註額定電氣數據以反映 240 V 50 Hz 運行；（3）在產品屬適用範圍時貼附 GSO 能效標籤；（4）為 RG2+ 產品添加光生物危害警告；並（5）按 DGSM 要求顯示製造商及在地進口商標識。中國能效標識與中國 RoHS 披露標識在阿曼無效力，應替換為 GSO 標籤及符合阿曼要求的標識。登記進口商在上市時承擔標籤合規責任。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — DGSM-adopted GSO marking and labelling required at Oman market placement (manufacturer / importer ID, ratings at 240 V, safety marks, GSO energy label, Arabic / English consumer information, RG2+ warnings)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (CN scope) — GB 7000-series markings and China Energy Label in Chinese; China RoHS disclosure label where applicable

source.publisher: MOCIIP — Directorate General for Standards and Metrology (DGSM), Sultanate of Oman

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Oman requires DGSM / GSO-compliant product marking and labelling, generally including Arabic and English consumer information, 240 V ratings, safety marks, the GSO energy-efficiency label, and RG2+ photobiological warnings. Chinese-language CN markings, the China Energy Label, and the China RoHS disclosure label have no standing in Oman. The in-country importer of record is responsible for compliant labelling at market placement; exporters should prepare Oman-specific artwork rather than reusing CN packaging.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿曼要求符合 DGSM / GSO 的产品标识与标签，通常包括阿拉伯语和英语消费者信息、240 V 额定值、安全标志、GSO 能效标签及 RG2+ 光生物警告。中文版中国标识、中国能效标识及中国 RoHS 披露标识在阿曼无效力。在地登记进口商在上市时负责标签合规；出口商应准备阿曼专用标签设计，而非沿用中国包装。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿曼要求符合 DGSM / GSO 的產品標識與標籤，通常包括阿拉伯語和英語消費者信息、240 V 額定值、安全標誌、GSO 能效標籤及 RG2+ 光生物警告。中文版中國標識、中國能效標識及中國 RoHS 披露標識在阿曼無效力。在地登記進口商在上市時負責標籤合規；出口商應準備阿曼專用標籤設計，而非沿用中國包裝。
